## Safety checklist
- [ ] This does not scrape, print, export, or persist credentials.
- [ ] This does not enable subscription sharing or hosted proxy use.
- [ ] This keeps the default bind address on loopback.
- [ ] This can be tested without private accounts using mock mode.
